basic_details.job_title: VITM Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 12 Office Assistant, Artist and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Technician, Junior Stenographer, Office Assistant, Education Assistant and Artist
basic_details.short_information: Visvesvaraya Industrial & Technological Museum has released the official Technician, Junior Stenographer, Office Assistant, Education Assistant and Artist Notification 2026 on 18-05-2026 at VITM Official Website. A total of 12 vacancies have been announced under the VITM Technician, Junior Stenographer, Office Assistant, Education Assistant and Artist Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 35 years (post-wise age limit applicable) with qualifications including Bachelor’s Degree in Science, Higher Secondary, SSC/Matriculation with ITI certificate, or Diploma/Certificate in Fine/Commer

age_limit.age_details: Max 35 years for Education Assistant & Technician 'A', Max 25 years for Junior Stenographer & Office Assistant (Gr.III). Age relaxation applicable for reserved categories.
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 35 years for Education Assistant & Technician 'A'. Maximum age limit is 25 years for Junior Stenographer & Office Assistant (Gr.III). Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per Government of India Rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s Degree in Science, Higher Secondary or equivalent, SSC or Matriculation with ITI certificate, Diploma/certificate in fine/commercial art
qualification.details: Education Assistant ‘A’: Bachelor’s Degree in Science with Physics and combination of any two subjects viz. Chemistry, Mathematics, Electronics, Computer Science, Astronomy, Geology and Statistics or Bachelor’s Degree in Science with Chemistry and combination of any two subjects viz. Zoology, Botany, Microbiology, Environmental Science, Bio-Technology and Molecular Biology from a duly recognized University. Junior Stenographer: Higher Secondary or its equivalent and minimum speed of 80 w.p.m. in Shorthand duly supported by certificate from a Government recognized Institution. Office Assistant (Gr.III): Higher Secondary or its equivalent. The Candidates must qualify in typing test of 10 minutes duration with at least 35 w.p.m. in English or 30 w.p.m. in Hindi on computer correspond to 10500/9000 Key Depression Per Hour (KDPH) respectively, duly supported by certificate from a Government recognized Institution. Technician ‘A’ (Fitter): SSC or Matriculation with certificate from ITI or equivalent in Fitter discipline. Candidates must have one year experience after obtaining the certificate for course duration of two years. For candidates obtaining certificates of one year course duration, two years relevant experience after obtaining the certificate shall be required. Technician ‘A’ (Carpenter): SSC or Matriculation with certificate from ITI or equivalent in Carpentry discipline. Candidates must have one year experience after obtaining the certificate for course duration of two years. For candidates obtaining certificates of one year course duration, two years relevant experience after obtaining the certificate shall be required. Artist ‘A’: Diploma/certificate in fine/commercial art of at least two year’s duration after SSLC. Candidates must have one year experience after obtaining the diploma/certificate for course duration of two years. For candidates obtaining diploma/certificates of one year course duration, two years relevant experience after obtaining the certificate shall be required.

salary_details.education assistant ‘a’: Pay Matrix Level-5: Rs.29200-92300/- with Basic Pay Rs.29,200/- plus usual allowances
salary_details.junior stenographer: Pay Matrix Level-04: Rs.25500-81100 with Basic Pay Rs.25,500/- plus usual allowances
salary_details.office assistant (gr.iii): Pay Matrix Level-2: Rs.19,900-63,200/- with Basic Pay Rs.19,900/- plus usual allowances
salary_details.technician ‘a’ (fitter): Pay Matrix Level-2: Rs.19,900-63,200/- with Basic Pay Rs.19,900/- plus usual allowances
salary_details.technician ‘a’ (carpenter): Pay Matrix Level-2: Rs.19,900-63,200/- with Basic Pay Rs.19,900/- plus usual allowances
salary_details.artist ‘a’: Pay Matrix Level-2: Rs.19,900-63,200/- with Basic Pay Rs.19,900/- plus usual allowances

selection_process: Written Test Skill Test Typing Test Document Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of VITM to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
